name: United States Natural Gas Fund, LP
business: UNG is a commodity pool that issues shares traded on the NYSE Arca. Its investment objective is for daily changes in its per share NAV to reflect daily changes in the price of the Benchmark Futures Contract (natural gas futures). UNG invests primarily in natural gas futures contracts and other natural gas-related investments to achieve this objective.

exposures.sentence: The investment objective of UNG is for the daily changes in percentage terms of its shares per share NAV to reflect the daily changes, in percentage terms, of the price of natural gas delivered at the Henry Hub, Louisiana, as measured by the daily changes in the price of the futures contract for natural gas traded on the NYMEX that is the near month contract to expire, except when the near month contract is within two weeks of expiration, in which case it will be measured by the futures contract that is the next month contract to expire (the Benchmark Futures Contract), plus interest earned on UNG’s collateral holdings, less UNG’s expenses.
